---
title: "Contact"
---

## Contact

**Zhou Yu**  
School of Electrical Engineering and Automation
Fuzhou University  
Fuzhou, China

- Home Page: <https://dqxy.fzu.edu.cn/info/1012/4795.htm>
- GitHub: <https://github.com/ZhouYuFZU>
- Email: zhouyu@fzu.edu.cn
- Google Scholar: <https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=pa4VEZgAAAAJ&hl=zh-CN>
- ORCID: 0000-0003-4394-1903


## Collaboration

Open to collaborations with researchers interested in battery energy storage management and distributed parameter system (DPS) modeling and control. Prospective Master's students are welcome to email me with inquiries.
